description:
Shruti is an AI engineer who started Array Ventures (like data structure - Array) to invest in technical founders like herself starting enterprise companies in areas such as AI, data, cloud, security, infra, etc. She uses her technical and GTM background to help companies in their 0 to 1m ARR journey by investing in their first ever raise. 

Many of her companies have been acquired by Paypal, ServiceNow, Apple, Amazon, Gartner, JAMF, and others. 

Shruti spent her early career as a developer on security and data tools. She has been investing in early stage companies at True Ventures and Samsung's venture fund. She has an MBA from University of Chicago and MS from Columbia University where she sometimes teaches as a professor in CS department. You can follow her on twitter(https://twitter.com/atshruti), substack (shrutigandhi.substack.com).
